sub_problems: Define a per-token-position controller bank with local receptive field; specify the local feature set each controller observes (last K tokens, local style features, register cues).
Train controllers to make local accept/modify/blend decisions; demonstrate global pattern emergence from purely local rules.
Evaluate that segment-level control composites (style + register + redaction) work without conflict, mirroring chromatophore + iridophore + papilla composition in cephalopod skin.
